sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 9

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 9:1
items.html:
(to the question) Bolet [protruding]
The names Bolet [protruding] and Shokea [sunken] are used only regarding the discernments of the Yesodot of the male and female. They are expressed in this way to convey a very subtle matter, namely: through the ascent of NHY to CHaGaT that took place at the time of the Ibur [conception], Malchut received the measure of Yesod — see Answer 65 — meaning that the very form of Aviut [thickness] that is in Yesod came into Malchut, so that their forms became equal. This is the secret of the change of the place of the Zivug [coupling], which in the Partzufim of AK was in the place of Malchut; that is, the Masach [screen] and the Aviut were corrected in the Partzufim of AK only in the vessel of Malchut, as is known. But here the Masach is no longer corrected in the place of Malchut, but in the place of Yesod, and for this reason Yesod is called Brit [covenant] — see Answer 20. And even in the Partzuf of Malchut herself, the Zivug is not in the place of her Malchut but only in the place of her Yesod. For a change of place occurred, due to the ascent of NHY to CHaGaT that took place in the Ibur of all the Partzufim of Atzilut.
